issues.title: qdrant vector store support
issues.body:
**Expected Behavior**

Qdrant vector database is not currently supported by Spring AI

**Current Behavior**

Qdrant vector database support along with all other vector stores as its benmarking is out performs all others.

**Context**
We are using Qdrant vector store to have all the embeddings stored, indexed and searched out of it.
So we would like Sping AI to support it.

comments.body: Hi @radhakrishna67. I'll try to contribute this feature.
